metadata.license_note: Government public information page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.publisher: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Government of India
metadata.title: Livestock Health and Disease Control Programme

text: The programme covers veterinary infrastructure, disease surveillance, mobile veterinary units, and call centre support. It is useful for learning Indian animal-health system language and escalation context.

metadata.license_note: Government public information page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.publisher: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Government of India
metadata.title: National Animal Disease Control Programme

text: NADCP describes FMD and brucellosis control, outbreak investigation, and regulation of animal movement. It is high-value India anchor text for reportable disease vocabulary.

metadata.license_note: NDDB public PDF; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Handbook of Good Dairy Husbandry Practices

text: This handbook covers dairy animal management, housing, feeding, health practices, calf care, and clean milk production. It anchors Indian dairy extension language for CPT.

metadata.license_note: NDDB public farmer page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Importance of Drinking Water for Dairy Animals

text: Dairy animals need regular access to clean drinking water. Water support is especially important in summer and for milk production, making this useful routine-care CPT text.

metadata.license_note: NDDB public farmer page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Calf Nutrition

text: Young calves should be reared carefully with attention to feeding, clean practices, growth, and health. This gives farmer-facing calf-care vocabulary.

metadata.license_note: NDDB public service page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Clean Milk Production Awareness

text: Clean milk production depends on hygiene, clean utensils, and careful handling at village level. It is useful for milk hygiene language without certifying sale safety.

metadata.license_note: NDDB public farmer page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Bloat

text: Bloat involves gas accumulation in the rumen and visible belly swelling. Prevention context includes careful feeding and avoiding risky grazing patterns. Do not include invasive treatment instructions in CPT chunks.

metadata.license_note: NDDB public farmer page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Aflatoxicosis

text: Mold on damp feed can produce toxins and reduce animal health and production. This text supports feed-storage and spoiled-feed vocabulary for CPT.

metadata.license_note: NDDB public farmer page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Fly Control

text: Regular disposal of manure and urine and avoiding stagnant drainage around cattle sheds helps reduce flies and maintain cleaner animal surroundings.

metadata.license_note: University extension page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.publisher: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University Agritech Portal
metadata.title: Calf Management

text: Calving and calf management text covers clean calving areas, bedding, newborn care, and basic management around birth. It is useful for Indian extension terminology.

metadata.license_note: FAO public manual; check FAO reuse terms before redistribution.
metadata.title: Small-Scale Dairy Farming Manual: Dairy Cattle and Buffalo Housing

text: Clean housing improves cow and calf health and milk quality. The manual covers manure handling, clean feeders and drinkers, insect control, safe floors, ventilation, and environmental comfort.

metadata.license_note: FAO public manual; check FAO reuse terms before redistribution.
metadata.title: Small-Scale Dairy Farming Manual: Feeding Dairy Cattle and Buffalo

text: Dairy cattle and buffalo need nutrients from roughages, concentrates, minerals, vitamins, and water. The manual explains digestion, feed types, feed value, and productivity context.

metadata.license_note: FAO public manual; check FAO reuse terms before redistribution.
metadata.title: Small-Scale Dairy Farming Manual: Conditions Affecting Dairy Cattle and Buffalo

text: Disease is described as a change that can lower production or cause death. The manual introduces common condition categories and disease observation language without needing raw treatment recipes.

metadata.license_note: FAO public manual; check FAO reuse terms before redistribution.
metadata.title: Small-Scale Dairy Farming Manual: Parasites in Dairy Cattle and Buffalo

text: Parasites can reduce production and affect young animals strongly. This source is useful for broad parasite vocabulary and observation language, not farmer dosing instructions.

metadata.license_note: FAO/IDF publication; check reuse terms before redistribution.
metadata.title: Guide to Good Dairy Farming Practice

text: Good dairy farming practice covers animal health, milk hygiene, nutrition, welfare, environment, and socio-economic management in practical farmer-oriented language.

metadata.license_note: WOAH standards page; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Animal Welfare and Dairy Cattle Production Systems

text: WOAH standards provide high-level vocabulary for animal welfare, handling, housing, and production systems. Country-specific legal language should remain metadata, not farmer advice.

metadata.license_note: Reference text; verify license and keep only non-procedural snippets for CPT.
metadata.title: MSD Veterinary Manual: Cattle Health Topics

text: Veterinary reference material can improve disease terminology and clinical-sign vocabulary. Sections with drug doses, routes, surgery, and procedures must be quarantined or stripped.

metadata.license_note: University extension content; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Dairy Extension Articles

text: Dairy extension articles cover practical herd management, calf care, nutrition, housing, recordkeeping, and farm workflows. Highly local regulations should be labeled, not used as India advice.

metadata.license_note: University extension content; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Dairy Extension Resources

text: University dairy extension resources provide broad management, feeding, housing, calf, and health vocabulary that can help CPT domain familiarity.

metadata.license_note: Secondary public information portal; verify reuse before redistribution.
metadata.title: Dairy Animal Management Context

text: Useful as farmer-facing context and language exposure. Do not use as sole factual grounding for safety-critical SFT/RAG claims.

metadata.license_note: Quarantine fixture.
metadata.title: Dairy Cattle Treatment Table

text: Mastitis may require veterinary treatment and supportive hygiene.
